evals.prompt: fix the pr comments on my current branch, there's like 3-4 things from alice's review i need to address
evals.expected_output: Detects the current PR, verifies the branch matches, fetches unresolved threads via the fetch_threads.py script, displays them as a numbered list, asks which to fix, then applies fixes locally. Asks before pushing. Never replies to or resolves any PR threads.
expectations: Verifies current git branch matches the PR's headRefName before fetching comments
Does NOT reply to, resolve, or comment on any PR review threads — only fetches and fixes locally
Asks the user before pushing — does NOT auto-push after fixes

evals.prompt: i'm on branch alice/fix-typo but the PR i care about is on alice/add-auth. can you /pr-comments for that PR?
evals.expected_output: Detects branch mismatch between current branch (alice/fix-typo) and the PR's headRefName (alice/add-auth). Stops and asks the user about the mismatch before doing anything else. Does not fetch comments or attempt fixes on the wrong branch.
expectations: Compares the current branch against the PR headRefName and flags the mismatch
Stops and asks the user about the mismatch before proceeding to fetch comments or apply fixes
Does NOT continue to fetch comments or execute fixes while on the wrong branch

evals.expected_output: Detects PR, verifies branch, fetches all unresolved threads, fixes all comments without asking which ones. Auto-resolves bot/app comments only (not human review comments). Commits via the commit skill and pushes automatically without confirmation.
expectations: Fixes all comments without prompting for selection (--auto mode)
Auto-resolves only bot/app-authored comments, not human reviewer comments
Pushes automatically without asking for confirmation in --auto mode
